name: io.github.TeleKashOracle/mcp-server
description: Prediction market probability oracle for AI agents. 15 tools across 500+ live markets from Kalshi, Polymarket & Metaculus. Structured TPF signals, cross-source arbitrage, noise detection, agent performance tracking with Brier scores. The probability oracle for the agent economy.

environmentVariables.description: Supabase project URL for TeleKash database
environmentVariables.name: SUPABASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Supabase anonymous key for read access to prediction markets
environmentVariables.name: SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
